note: HK night-sky catalogue (HKS-84). Stars: Yale Bright Star Catalogue 5th rev. ed. (BSC5, public domain, Yale/CDS V/50), trimmed to Vmag <= 5 and Dec >= -65 deg for Hong Kong (22.3 N); figure stars fainter than the cut are force-included. Fields per star: [HR, ra_hours_J2000, dec_deg_J2000, Vmag, B-V]. Constellations: modern IAU figures adapted from the Stellarium western sky culture (constellationship.fab, figure topology), HIP ids resolved to HR by positional crossmatch against the Hipparcos main catalogue (ESA 1997, CDS I/239); Chinese names are the standard IAU names used in HK astronomy education. Generated by source-scripts/hk-sky/build_hk_sky.mjs.
